overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a muddy frontier town street during a rainy night. The character passes wooden buildings, telegraph poles, and encounters NPCs loitering outside a storefront before turning toward a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy main street with large wooden hotel

events.description: horse walks past the character on the left side of the street
large two-story building passes out of view behind the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past a large two-story wooden building with illuminated windows and balcony

notable_agents.action: horse walking past the character on the left side of the muddy street

entered.detail: large wooden building with second-floor balcony and warm lantern light in windows
weathered wooden plank fence lining the right side of the street
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy street in a frontier town at night, passing a large two-story wooden hotel with glowing windows on the left. A horse walks past on the left at the start, and the street is lined with a wooden fence on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy street lined with telegraph poles

agents.ego_description: continuing down the muddy street toward distant lights, passing wooden utility poles

entered.detail: building with warm glowing lights visible at the end of the street
tall street lamp casting yellow light onto the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the open muddy street, leaving the large hotel behind. The street is flanked by wooden fences and telegraph poles, with distant buildings glowing warmly in the rainy night ahead.

events.description: group of NPCs becomes visible standing in a doorway ahead on the left
character turns left toward a building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of townspeople standing in a doorway, then turning toward a building on the left

notable_agents.action: group of men standing and conversing outside a wooden storefront doorway

entered.detail: single-story wooden building with porch and illuminated interior doorway
wooden barrel sitting near the building entrance
small wooden structure with closed doors on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden storefront where several NPCs stand conversing in the doorway. After passing them, the character turns left toward another building, with a small wooden shed visible on the right and street lamps illuminating the rainy scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked frontier town at night, transitioning from a wide street view toward a specific building entrance. It begins by trailing a character walking past a large two-story wooden hotel with glowing windows, as a horse crosses the muddy path beside a perimeter fence. As the hotel recedes, the camera proceeds down the open street flanked by telegraph poles and fences, moving toward the warm, distant glow of other buildings through the rain. The scene then shifts as the character approaches a wooden storefront where several NPCs are gathered in conversation. Finally, after passing the group, the camera turns left toward another building entrance, gliding past a small wooden shed under the dim light of street lamps.
